description: BotLens diagnostics and RCA dashboard. Assumes observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 stores structured backend events, observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 stores failure counters, and Loki captures backend warn/error logs.

panels.title: Structured Event Counts By Event Name

targets.rawSql: SELECT e.event_name AS metric, count(*)::double precision AS value FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.observed_at)  AND COALESCE(e.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(e.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(e.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 15;

panels.description: Most frequent structured events in the selected window.

panels.title: Warnings / Errors Over Time
panels.description: Warn/error log rate from Loki backend logs.

panels.title: Top Failure Modes

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(e.failure_mode, 'unknown') AS metric, count(*)::double precision AS value FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.observed_at) AND COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') <> ''  AND COALESCE(e.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(e.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(e.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 12;

panels.description: Structured event failure modes ranked by frequency.

panels.title: Queue Overflow Events By Stage

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(e.queue_name, e.event_name) AS metric, count(*)::double precision AS value FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.observed_at) AND e.event_name IN ('telemetry_backpressure_entered', 'symbol_fact_queue_overflow', 'run_lifecycle_queue_overflow_dropped_oldest', 'run_notification_queue_overflow', 'fanout_channel_overflow', 'viewer_snapshot_buffer_overflow')  AND COALESCE(e.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(e.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(e.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY value DESC;

panels.description: Queue/slot overflow and backpressure events by stage.

panels.title: Viewer Send Failures By Failure Mode

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(m.failure_mode, 'unknown') AS metric, ROUND(sum(m.value)::numeric, 2)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name = 'viewer_send_fail_total'  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 12;

panels.description: Failure-mode breakdown for viewer send failures.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN metric_name = 'db_write_fail_total' THEN 'db_write_fail_total' WHEN metric_name = 'db_write_retry_total' THEN 'db_write_retry_total' WHEN metric_name = 'db_duplicate_skip_total' THEN 'db_duplicate_skip_total' WHEN metric_name = 'db_stale_update_total' THEN 'db_stale_update_total' ELSE COALESCE(queue_name, metric_name) END AS metric, sum(m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('db_write_fail_total', 'db_write_retry_total', 'db_duplicate_skip_total', 'db_stale_update_total')  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Snapshot Load Failures

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(e.failure_mode, e.event_name) AS metric, count(*)::double precision AS value FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.observed_at) AND e.event_name IN ('viewer_snapshot_load_failed', 'db_initial_state_load_failed')  AND COALESCE(e.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(e.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(e.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY value DESC;

panels.description: Snapshot and initial-state load failures grouped by failure mode.

panels.title: Deprecated / Unknown Message Kinds

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), COALESCE(m.message_kind, 'unknown') AS metric, sum(m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name = 'ingest_messages_unknown_kind_total' AND COALESCE(m.message_kind, 'unknown') IN ('unknown', 'deprecated')  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Deprecated and unknown ingest message kinds over time.

panels.title: Critical Event Families

targets.rawSql: SELECT e.event_name AS metric, count(*)::double precision AS value FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.observed_at) AND e.level IN ('WARN', 'ERROR')  AND COALESCE(e.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(e.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(e.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 12;

panels.description: Most common WARN/ERROR structured event families.

panels.title: Recent Structured Events

targets.rawSql: SELECT e.observed_at AS "Time", e.level, e.event_name, e.bot_id, e.run_id, e.series_key, e.component, e.queue_name, e.storage_target, e.failure_mode, COALESCE(e.message, e.details::text, '') AS detail FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.observed_at)  AND COALESCE(e.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(e.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(e.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  ORDER BY e.observed_at DESC LIMIT 100;

panels.description: Recent structured events across all levels.

panels.title: Recent Warning / Error Log Stream
panels.description: Raw warning/error backend log stream for RCA.

list.name: bot_id
list.label: Bot
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT bot_id AS __value, bot_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT bot_id AS __value, bot_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: run_id
list.label: Run
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT run_id AS __value, run_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1 DESC;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT run_id AS __value, run_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1 DESC;

list.name: series_key
list.label: Series
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT series_key AS __value, series_key AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_view_state WHERE series_key <> '__run__' AND COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT series_key AS __value, series_key AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_view_state WHERE series_key <> '__run__' AND COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: component
list.label: Component
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT component AS __value, component AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(component, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT component AS __value, component AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(component, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: queue_name
list.label: Queue
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT queue_name AS __value, queue_name AS __text FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(queue_name, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT queue_name AS __value, queue_name AS __text FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(queue_name, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: storage_target
list.label: Storage
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT storage_target AS __value, storage_target AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(storage_target, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT storage_target AS __value, storage_target AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(storage_target, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: failure_mode
list.label: Failure
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT failure_mode AS __value, failure_mode AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(failure_mode, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT failure_mode AS __value, failure_mode AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(failure_mode, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

title: Diagnostics & Failure Analysis
